Specification

Details

About this item
Mid-Century Modern Design: This long TV stand features a mid-century modern aesthetic with a walnut wood grain finish and rattan weave design on the cabinet doors, providing a stylish and timeless look that complements any vintage home decor
Spacious Storage Space: With 6 tiers of large storage shelves and a large tabletop, this entertainment center offers ample space to store and organize your media accessories, books, and decorative items, keeping your entertainment area organized
High-Quality Construction: Crafted from premium MDF, this TV console cabinet is built to last and ensures years of stability and durability. The delicate golden metal handles add a touch of elegance while providing easy operation

Versatile Long Cabinet: This media console is not just for TVs; it can also serve as a storage cabinet for your collectibles, framed photos, vases, or any other personal items. Suitable for various scenarios of your home, such as living room, bedroom
